findings.message: "email" is added to frontend_rum_allowed_query_params, the RUM attribution allowlist whose query-string values are captured into telemetry. Email is PII and is not needed for the stated purpose (UTM-style marketing attribution). This collects user email addresses from the query string into telemetry/monitoring data, which is unnecessary PII collection and likely persists beyond purpose.
findings.suggestion: Remove the "email" entry from frontend_rum_allowed_query_params. Keep the allowlist limited to non-PII attribution params (utm_*). If a per-user identifier is genuinely required, use a non-PII pseudonymous ID rather than the raw email, and document the purpose and retention.
